entries.result: Greedy and miserly — this NPC hoards every coin and values gold above friendship.
Kind-hearted and generous — quick to offer aid, slow to judge.
Mysterious and secretive — speaks in riddles and knows more than they let on.
Boastful and loud — every story involves their heroic deeds (real or imagined).
Cautious and paranoid — trusts no one, checks every shadow, sleeps with a weapon.
Curious and inquisitive — asks endless questions, touches things they shouldn't.
Grumpy and pessimistic — everything is terrible and will only get worse.
Cheerful and optimistic — sees the bright side of even the darkest dungeon.
Stoic and reserved — speaks little but observes everything patiently.
Scheming and manipulative — every kindness has a hidden price.
Honorable and just — lives by a strict code and expects others to do the same.
Chaotic and unpredictable — flip-flops moods wildly, keeps everyone guessing.
